texto: Stand tall on the summit after a tedious climb. Take in the remarkable scenery and the exhilaration of accomplishment. But don't pause for long
autor: there are greater mountains to climb while you still possess the drive and capacity to do so.
explicacao: Citação de there are greater mountains to climb while you still possess the drive and capacity to do so. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Stand tall on the summit after a tedious climb.
